title: AI-Muhallab Attacks Kish
description: According to 'Ali b. Muhammad -al-Mufacl4al b. Muhammad and others: When al-Muhallab attacked Kish, his vanguard was under the command of Abu al-Adham Ziyad b. 'Amr al-Zimmani, with three thousand, which really counted as five thousand683 because Abu al-Adham by himself was worth two thousand in valor, leadership, and strategy. While al-Muhallab was attacking Kish, there came to him the paternal cousin of the king of al-Khuttal,684 urging him to attack that province. Al-Muhallab sent off with him his son Yazid.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
